channel.title: Curriculum Vitae on Graham Brooks
channel.description: Recent content in Curriculum Vitae on Graham Brooks

item.description: Credentials # Certifications # AWS Certified Solutions Architect Associate (AWS-CSA-A) # Earned Jan. 2024 Red Hat Certified Engineer (RHCE) # Earned Mar. 2023 Red Hat Certified Professional (RHCP) # Awarded Apr. 2022 CompTIA Security Plus (Sec+) # Earned Feb. 2022 Red Hat Certified Systems Administrator (RHCSA) # Earned Sep. 2020 Degrees # BS - Civil Engineering - Washington State University # Earned May 2018

Platforms: # Management Platforms # Amazon Web Services (AWS) # 3 Years of Experience Used for EC2 and ECS resources for demo and testing environments VMWare vSphere # 2 Years of Experience Managed extensively within customer and prospect environments Proxmox # 5 Years of Experience Used previously for my Home lab Container Platforms # Kubernetes # 6 Months of Experience Currently learning as part of earning my Red Hat Certified Architect (RHCA) Portainer # 1 Year of Experience Currently using as a docker frontend within my home lab.

Work Experience # Context: # I am a seasoned Red Hat Certified Engineer with a specialized focus in Cloud & IT Security Automation. I have 7 years of intense industry experience and have successfully sold and delivered services valued in the 8-figure range. My expertise spans across solutions architecture and sales engineering, where I have consistently delivered high-value solutions to complex technical challenge. Experience: # Presales Manager - Syxsense Inc.
